'''Reike Th'san''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] arms smuggler who operated in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], a city on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], as of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="YJCCG" />
